description: Slip-on sandals from catwalk with cutouts and applique work. The simple design is perfect for everyday wear. Team these with dresses, or jeans and tops. Upper Synthetic leather uppers covering the forefoot and midfoot Stitch detailing, cut outs and applique work for added style and reinforcement Elasticated insert on the front for snug Fit Cushioned footbed in an ergonomic design for extra comfort and added style Outsole TPU outsole with heel Textured design on the forefoot and heel for added comfort shoe Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
